title: Ethereal Aerated Russian Potatoes Galette
description: A light, airy, and pungent Russian dish made with Yukon gold potatoes, featuring a shio-koji cure for a unique flavor profile, making it a great low-sodium alternative.
instructions: Peel the potatoes and slice them thinly, using a mandoline or sharp knife.
In a large bowl, combine the sliced potatoes and shio-koji, making sure the potatoes are evenly coated.
Transfer the potato mixture to a clean kitchen towel and gather the edges to form a tight bundle.
Squeeze the towel gently to remove excess moisture from the potatoes.
Transfer the potatoes to a parchment-lined baking sheet, spreading them out in a single layer.
Drizzle with olive oil and sprinkle with dried dill weed.
Season with salt to taste, if needed.
Bake for 20 minutes or until the potatoes are tender and lightly browned.
Remove from the oven and garnish with chopped chives, if desired.
